title: Training Budget and Professional Development Request Process
text:
Q: How can I request funding for training and professional development?
A: Employees can request funding for training and professional development through the company's online request form, which is available on the HR portal. Requests should be submitted at least 30 days prior to the training start date to allow for proper review and approval. Each employee is allocated an annual training budget of $1,500, which can be used for workshops, courses, certifications, or conferences relevant to their role. To initiate the process, complete the form detailing the training program, associated costs, and how it aligns with your professional development goals. Once submitted, your manager will review the request and provide feedback within 10 business days. If approved, the request will be forwarded to HR for final approval. For any questions, please contact the HR department at hr@company.com.
